allow: PowerShell($j = Get-Job | Where-Object { $_.State -eq 'Running' }; if \($j\) { "still running: $\($j.Count\)" } else { "no running jobs" }; Get-Item "C:\\Users\\Ahmed Samy\\Desktop\\clark-v19_62.zip" | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}}, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell($secret = -join \(\(48..57\) + \(65..90\) + \(97..122\) | Get-Random -Count 40 | ForEach-Object {[char]$_}\); Write-Host "SECRET=$secret"; $secret | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\clark_secret.txt" -Encoding utf8 -NoNewline)

PowerShell($secret = "WEGxV8d0JroZKRkz94aYulB7i1phCQmcT23t5vDb"; $url = "https://clark-factory.vercel.app/api/automation-tick"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -Method GET -Headers @{"Authorization"="Bearer $secret"} -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $err = $_.Exception.Response; if \($err\) { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($err.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $body = $sr.ReadToEnd\(\); Write-Host "STATUS: $\([int]$err.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "BODY: $body" } else { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Raw "$env:TEMP\\clark_cron_setup.sh"; $contentLF = $content -replace "`r`n", "`n"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("$env:TEMP\\clark_cron_setup.sh", $contentLF, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); Write-Host "Normalized to LF endings, size: $\(\(Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\clark_cron_setup.sh"\).Length\) bytes")
